type.description: Filter type. Canonical: mapping, condition, drop, loop, set, remove, script, http_call, soap_call, sql_call.

mappingFilterConfig.description: Mapping filter module configuration. Maps fields from source to target paths.

conditionFilterConfig.description: Condition filter module. Routes records based on an expression evaluated against each record. Records matching the expression go through the 'then' branch; others go through 'else'. An absent branch keeps the record unchanged. To drop records use the explicit 'drop' filter inside a branch.

expression.description: Boolean expression evaluated against each record.

then.description: Nested filters to execute when condition is true.

else.description: Nested filters to execute when condition is false.

dropFilterConfig.description: Drop filter module. Removes every record it receives from the stream. Typically placed inside a condition branch to filter records out explicitly.

loopFilterConfig.description: Loop filter module. Iterates over an array field on each record, running a nested filter chain per item. The current item is exposed under the configured 'itemName' alias; the root record stays available as 'record'. Loop metadata is exposed read-only at '_metadata.loop.<itemName>.index'.

field.description: Path to the array field, relative to the input record (root record for the outermost loop, parent scope for nested loops). Supports dot notation.

itemName.description: Alias exposed to nested filters for the current item. Cannot be 'record', '_metadata', or 'loop', and must not duplicate an active parent loop alias.

filters.description: Nested filters executed for every item.

setFilterConfig.description: Set filter module configuration. Sets a field to a literal value on each record (create or overwrite).

target.description: Field path to set (e.g. id, user.id, metadata.version). Supports dot notation for nested paths.

value.description: Literal value to set. Can be string, number, boolean, or null. Type is preserved.

removeFilterConfig.description: Remove filter module configuration. Removes one or more fields from each record.

target.description: Field path(s) to remove. Either a single non-empty string or a non-empty array of non-empty strings. Supports dot notation for nested paths.

scriptFilterConfig.description: Script filter module configuration. Executes JavaScript transformations using Goja.

script.description: Inline JavaScript source code containing a transform(record) function.

scriptFile.description: Path to JavaScript file containing the transform(record) function.

allOf.description: HTTP call filter module configuration. Makes HTTP requests to external APIs for record enrichment.

keys.description: List of key configurations for extracting values from records and using them in requests.

mergeStrategy.description: How to merge HTTP response with input records.

dataField.description: Field to extract from HTTP response.

allOf.description: SOAP call filter module configuration. Makes SOAP requests to external APIs for record enrichment.

keys.description: List of key configurations for extracting values from records and using them in request metadata.

mergeStrategy.description: How to merge SOAP response with input records.

resultKey.description: Key for storing the SOAP response when append mode is used.

dataField.description: Field path to extract from the parsed SOAP response map before merge/replace/append. When omitted, the full parsed SOAP response is used.

sqlCallFilterConfig.description: SQL call filter module configuration. Executes SQL queries for record enrichment.

mergeStrategy.description: How to merge query results with input records.

resultKey.description: Key for storing result in append mode.

cacheConfig.description: Cache configuration for SQL call filter.

fieldMapping.description: Field mapping. Requires target. Omit source to delete the target field.

source.description: Source field path. Omit to delete the target field.
